subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! In these successive years, wherein the world of creation hath been deprived of comfort and tranquility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی در این سنین متوالیات که جهان آفرینش محروم از راحت و آسایش شرق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity
